name: minima
description: Minima is an open source RAG on-premises containers, with ability to integrate with ChatGPT and MCP. Minima can also be used as a fully local RAG.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Find a context in local files (PDF, CSV, DOCX, MD, TXT)

prompts.name: query
prompts.description: Find a context in a local files

env.name: LOCAL_FILES_PATH
env.description: Specify the root folder for indexing (on your cloud or local pc).

env.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID
env.description: Specify the embedding model to use.

env.name: EMBEDDING_SIZE
env.description: Define the embedding dimension provided by the model.

env.name: USER_ID
env.description: Required for ChatGPT integration, just use your email.

env.name: PASSWORD
env.description: Required for ChatGPT integration, just use any password.
